headline: Does Tyler Technologies (TYL) Have a Long Runway for Sales Growth?
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Mid Cap Fund”. The Madison Mid Cap Fund (Class I) declined 4.28% in the quarter, compared to the Russell Midcap Index’s 1.29% return. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter saw a market shift from tech […]

headline: South Carolina Expands Access to Government Services with Tyler Technologies’ Resident AI Assistant
summary: PLANO, Texas, June 30, 2026--Tyler Technologies successfully launched its Resident AI Assistant in South Carolina to improve the speed in which residents can access information.
